---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */

body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1000px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:80px 60px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
  text-align:center;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3.4rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:700px;
  margin:auto;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
}

/* ===== CONTENT CARD ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:40px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  text-align:center;
}

/* ===== BLOG CONTENT ===== */

.coming-soon{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-size:1.5rem;
  font-weight:600;
  margin-bottom:16px;
  letter-spacing:-0.5px;
}

.description{
  color:#4b5563;
  max-width:650px;
  margin:auto;
  line-height:1.9;
  font-size:1rem;
}

.blog-list{
  margin-top:22px;
  text-align:left;
  display:inline-block;
}

.blog-list li{
  margin-bottom:10px;
  color:#374151;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  margin-top:34px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:12px;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-weight:600;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

My Blog

Thoughts, analytics, visualizations, and learning experiences.

This section will include posts related to data analytics, statistics, research projects, and personal development.

:::

::: {.card-box}

<div class="coming-soon">

Blog Section Under Construction

</div> <div class="description">

I am currently preparing content for this section.

Future posts will include:

<ul class="blog-list"> <li>Data Analytics Projects</li> <li>Statistical Insights</li> <li>Visualization Techniques</li> <li>Research Experiences</li> <li>Learning Notes and Reflections</li> </ul>

Stay tuned for upcoming articles.

</div>

:::

<div class="footer">

Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>

</div> ```
